      90 Nights Risk Free Guarantee

      Every order is backed by our Risk Free 90 Nights Money Back Guarantee

       

      If you’re not satisfied with results, please contact our support team and include your order ID #. We will assist you with the returns process.

      Shipping + Warranty + Returns

      Product Safety & Specifications

      • Size: 15.5" x 10.625" x 6.25"
      • Weight: 1.94 lbs
      • Material: 100% Polyurethane Memory Foam
      • Dynamic ThermoTrac™ technology
      • 3 modes: traction lift, heat, vibration massage
      • Wireless device with provided USB - C charging cable
      • Charging time: 90 minutes to full
      • 4x 30-minute sessions per charge
      • Input power: 10W
      • Safety features include auto-shutoff (at 30 min. intervals) and temperature regulation (limited to 112° F)

      ThermoTrac™ Technology

      Experience The 3-In-1 Neck Therapy

      Traction Therapy

      Traction Realignment System gently lifts and stretches your neck at the optimal 26° angle to restore your spine’s natural curve. This eases stiffness, relieves deep tension, and helps reverse slouched posture.

      Vibration Massage

      4 unique vibration patterns designed for breaking up stiffness and calming irritated muscles—so your neck can finally let go of years of built-up tension.

      Heat Therapy

      Built-in thermal pads warm to a precise 112°F (50°C) — the ideal temperature to calm tight muscles and improve circulation.

      Four Major Upgrades To The Thera Pillow

      Rechargeable Battery

      Take it anywhere — 2500 mAh battery lasts up to 2 hours.

      Mulberry Silk Cover

      Wrapped in cooling silk for a soft, luxurious feel.

      30 Min Safety Shut Off

      Four 30-min sessions on one charge, worry-free.

      Regulated Warmth

      112°F (50°C) heating with advanced ThermoTrac tech.

      Designed By Engineers. Built To PT Standards

      We spent over $50,000 and 2 years of development to make sure Thera Pillow isn't just a neck massager. It's an all in one neck therapy device that actually treats the root cause. Every order goes through in depth quality control to ensure that your order arrive in perfect condition.

      Safe & Relaxing Therapy Session

      14x Cheaper Than Weekly Appointments.

      Thera Pillow pays for itself in days, not months. Therapist-recommended and clinically backed, it delivers gentle relief without harsh pressure or risky adjustments. Use it every night. No scheduling. No travel. No recurring fees. Just safe, consistent neck care whenever you need it.

      90 Night Risk-Free Guarantee

      There's literally no risk!

      You deserve the best natural pain relief to live life as your best self. If you don't see your desired results, we don't want your money!

       

      We are so confident in our product that we offer a full 90 night risk-free guarantee if you don’t see improvements with your results! Try it for 90 days and if you're not satisfied for any reason, simply email us support@calmara.com with your order ID for returns and refund!

      FAQs

      How does the Thera Pillow work?

      Thera Pillow utilizes traction, heat, and vibration massage combined with an ergonomic contour memory foam design.

       

      This breakthrough technology stretches your neck at just the right angle and decompress your cervical spine. Then, it deploys soothing heat massages to boost nutrient and oxygen rich blood flow to your muscles, promoting regeneration of tissues.

      What makes Thera Pillow better than any other devices out there?

      What makes the Original Thera Pillow special is that it combines three therapies in one—heat, massage, and gentle traction—to relax muscles and realign your neck for lasting relief. Plus, it’s wireless, safe to fall asleep on, and wrapped in cooling silk for comfort you won’t find anywhere else.

      How do I use Thera Pillow?

      1.   Charge it using our provided USB-C cable and charging adapter for about 4 to 6 hours
      2.   Hold the massage or heat button for 5 seconds until the light turns on.
      3.   Press the buttons again to change to different massaging speeds and heat settings
      4.   Enjoy your relaxing massage!

      How long should I use Thera Pillow for?

      We recommend starting with 15 minutes to let your neck adjust. Over time, you can work your way up to a full session. For your reference, Thera Pillow’s gentle heat + massage + traction cycle runs for 30 minutes, which is usually the perfect amount of time to relax your neck and help restore its natural curve.

      Is Thera Pillow wireless?

      Yes! Our Thera Pillow has been upgraded to be fully wireless and rechargeable for your daily use. 

      How should I clean Thera Pillow?

      Its fabric is oil and dust resistant but we suggest wiping Thera Pillow with a disinfectant wipe after use as the pillow's cover is not washable.

      Is it safe for everyone to use?

      We designed our Thera Pillow to be accommodating to all needs no matter the age or gender. However, every situation is different. For detailed guidelines to your specific needs, we recommend consulting with your provided medical professional.

      Can I return it if I don't see results?

      Absolutely! We provide a full Money Back Guarantee within 90 days of delivery in any case you aren't satisfied with our product. To get in touch, email us at support@calmara.com and we will respond within 12 hours of receiving!
